content:
📜 Why This Works:
✔ Balances power dynamics between archetypes.
✔ Introduces long-term strategic identity for each player.
✔ Adds depth through elemental and environmental interactions.

📜 2. Elemental System – Character, Item, & Environment Charges

📜 Each character, item, and environment now has an elemental charge similar to Pokémon-type matchups.

✔ Character Elemental Charges (Assigned at Start)
• Fire, Water, Earth, Air, Shadow, Light, etc.
• Some archetypes will naturally resist or be weak to certain settings or artifacts.

✔ Item Charges Affect Player Interactions
• Example: A Fire-Based Weapon gets a bonus in a Dry, Hot Environment but weakens in a Water-Based Setting.
• Example: A Holy Artifact might be unusable by a Shadow-Aligned Character.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 449 (chunk 449/555)
